Network-wide

References & Standards

Every framework, audit, induction handbook, Cambridge standard and Indonesian regulation in one place. Read-only — edits flow through docs/ + seed scripts.

—
Docs indexed
across 8 categories
—
Binding
Charter + non-negotiables
—
Last build
dist/references-data
Recently opened
For your role
▸

Handbooks

0

Year-1 induction tracks (📕 Charter NN1-NN5 bound) + role-operational 90-day onboarding (🛡 paired with weekly-checklist). Source: docs/induction/ + docs/handbooks/; seeded via scripts/induction/seed-induction-programs.js.
▸

Frameworks

0

Live framework JSON used by KPI, Appraisal and Competency. Many are also Firestore-seeded — this is the canonical source.
▸

Cross-Module Audits

0

Cross-module integrity audits and forward-looking drafts. INDEX.md is the entry point.
▸

Cambridge Standards

0

Verbatim Cambridge text — the anchor every framework cross-references. Stored under docs/research/cambridge/.
▸

Permendiknas / Permendikbud

0

Verbatim Indonesian Ministry of Education regulations. Loaded on demand by SKL / PIGP chip popovers.
▸

Schemas & Governance

0

Firestore SQL-style catalogue, design tokens, contributing rules and the binding Induction Charter.
▸

Organization

0

Network-wide reports-to topology. Roles catalogue is rendered by /roles-positions.
▸

Eduversal Standards

0

23-section, 393-madde Eduversal-authored "Academic Standards: Eduversal Partner Schools Network" manual. Network-wide policy authority for governance / curriculum / assessment / safeguarding / QA / operations. Tag work with ES X.Y via the ES chip family.
▸

AI Framework

0

Eduversal AI Competency Framework v1.0 — 3 verbatim parts (Teacher · Student · Institutional) + appendices + UNESCO alignment + 7 practical companion docs (3 playbooks · prompt library · red lines · decision trees · weekly tips · classroom activities). Tag work with data-aicf-ref via the AICF chip family.
No matches Try a broader term, switch facets, or clear the search. Tip: search supports doc-body tokens too — try NN3, F3L, mentor-cert.
Loading…
Loading…
